title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to help developers convert Oracle database data types such as VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE into PostgreSQL equivalents. The tutorial covers full precision and internationalization support while explaining the conversion process.
